name: Rum Truffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate chips with whipping cream in a heavy, medium saucepan over low heat, stirring occasionally.
2. Whisk in rum extract and vanilla until blended.
3. Pour into a pie pan and refrigerate until mixture is fudgy but soft, about 75 minutes.
4. Shape about 1 tablespoon into 1 1/4 inch balls.
5. Roll the balls in your palms.
6. Place the balls on waxed paper.
7. Sift powdered sugar and cocoa into a shallow bowl.
8. Roll each ball in the sugar-cocoa mixture; place in petit four or candy cases.
